name: docker-compose
description: Define and run multi-container applications with Docker

name: --build-arg
options.description: Set build-time variables for services

name: --compress
options.description: Compress the build context using gzip. DEPRECATED

name: --force-rm
options.description: Always remove intermediate containers. DEPRECATED

name: --memory
-m
options.description: Set memory limit for the build container. Not supported on buildkit yet

name: --no-cache
options.description: Do not use cache when building the image

name: --no-rm
options.description: Do not remove intermediate containers after a successful build. DEPRECATED

name: --parallel
options.description: Build images in parallel. DEPRECATED

name: --progress
options.description: Set type of progress output (auto, tty, plain, quiet)

name: --pull
options.description: Always attempt to pull a newer version of the image

name: --quiet
-q
options.description: Don't print anything to STDOUT

name: --ssh
options.description: Set SSH authentications used when building service images. (use 'default' for using your default SSH Agent)

subcommands.name: config
subcommands.description: Converts the compose file to platform's canonical format

name: --format
options.description: Format the output. Values: [yaml | json]

name: --hash
options.description: Print the service config hash, one per line

name: --images
options.description: Print the image names, one per line

name: --no-interpolate
options.description: Don't interpolate environment variables

name: --no-normalize
options.description: Don't normalize compose model

name: --output
-o
options.description: Save to file (default to stdout)

name: --profiles
options.description: Print the profile names, one per line

name: --quiet
-q
options.description: Only validate the configuration, don't print anything

name: --resolve-image-digests
options.description: Pin image tags to digests

name: --services
options.description: Print the service names, one per line

name: --volumes
options.description: Print the volume names, one per line

subcommands.name: cp
subcommands.description: Copy files/folders between a service container and the local filesystem

name: --all
options.description: Copy to all the containers of the service

name: --archive
-a
options.description: Archive mode (copy all uid/gid information)

name: --follow-link
-L
options.description: Always follow symbol link in SRC_PATH

name: --index
options.description: Index of the container if there are multiple instances of a service

name: --build
options.description: Build images before starting containers

name: --force-recreate
options.description: Recreate containers even if their configuration and image haven't changed

name: --no-build
options.description: Don't build an image, even if it's missing

name: --no-recreate
options.description: If containers already exist, don't recreate them. Incompatible with --force-recreate

name: --remove-orphans
options.description: Remove containers for services not defined in the Compose file

name: --rmi
options.description: Remove images used by services. "local" remove only images that don't have a custom tag ("local"|"all")

name: --timeout
-t
options.description: Specify a shutdown timeout in seconds

name: --volumes
-v
options.description: Remove named volumes declared in the `volumes` section of the Compose file and anonymous volumes attached to containers

subcommands.name: events
subcommands.description: Receive real time events from containers

name: --json
options.description: Output events as a stream of json objects

subcommands.name: exec
subcommands.description: Execute a command in a running container

name: --detach
-d
options.description: Detached mode: Run command in the background

name: --env
-e
options.description: Set environment variables

name: --index
options.description: Index of the container if there are multiple instances of a service [default: 1]

name: --interactive
-i
options.description: Keep STDIN open even if not attached

name: --no-TTY
-T
options.description: Disable pseudo-TTY allocation. By default `docker compose exec` allocates a TTY

name: --privileged
options.description: Give extended privileges to the process

name: --tty
-t
options.description: Allocate a pseudo-TTY

name: --user
-u
options.description: Run the command as this user

name: --workdir
-w
options.description: Path to workdir directory for this command

subcommands.name: images
subcommands.description: List images used by the created containers

name: --quiet
-q
options.description: Only display IDs

name: --signal
-s
options.description: SIGNAL to send to the container

name: --follow
-f
options.description: Follow log output

name: --no-color
options.description: Produce monochrome output

name: --no-log-prefix
options.description: Don't print prefix in logs

name: --since
options.description: Show logs since timestamp (e.g. 2013-01-02T13:23:37Z) or relative (e.g. 42m for 42 minutes)

name: --tail
options.description: Number of lines to show from the end of the logs for each container

name: --timestamps
-t
options.description: Show timestamps

name: --until
options.description: Show logs before a timestamp (e.g. 2013-01-02T13:23:37Z) or relative (e.g. 42m for 42 minutes)

name: --all
-a
options.description: Show all stopped Compose projects

name: --filter
options.description: Filter output based on conditions provided

name: --format
options.description: Format the output. Values: [pretty | json]

name: --quiet
-q
options.description: Only display IDs

subcommands.name: port
subcommands.description: Print the public port for a port binding

name: --index
options.description: Index of the container if service has multiple replicas

name: --protocol
options.description: Tcp or udp

name: --all
-a
options.description: Show all stopped containers (including those created by the run command)

name: --filter
options.description: Filter services by a property (supported filters: status)

name: --format
options.description: Format the output. Values: [pretty | json]

name: --quiet
-q
options.description: Only display IDs

name: --services
options.description: Display services

name: --status
options.description: Filter services by status. Values: [paused | restarting | removing | running | dead | created | exited]

name: --ignore-pull-failures
options.description: Pull what it can and ignores images with pull failures

name: --include-deps
options.description: Also pull services declared as dependencies

name: --no-parallel
options.description: DEPRECATED disable parallel pulling

name: --parallel
options.description: DEPRECATED pull multiple images in parallel

name: --quiet
-q
options.description: Pull without printing progress information

name: --ignore-push-failures
options.description: Push what it can and ignores images with push failures

name: --timeout
-t
options.description: Specify a shutdown timeout in seconds

name: --all
-a
options.description: Deprecated - no effect

name: --force
-f
options.description: Don't ask to confirm removal

name: --stop
-s
options.description: Stop the containers, if required, before removing

name: --volumes
-v
options.description: Remove any anonymous volumes attached to containers

subcommands.name: run
subcommands.description: Run a one-off command on a service

name: --detach
-d
options.description: Run container in background and print container ID

name: --entrypoint
options.description: Override the entrypoint of the image

name: --env
-e
options.description: Set environment variables

name: --interactive
-i
options.description: Keep STDIN open even if not attached

name: --label
-l
options.description: Add or override a label

name: --name
options.description: Assign a name to the container

name: --no-TTY
-T
options.description: Disable pseudo-TTY allocation (default: auto-detected)

name: --no-deps
options.description: Don't start linked services

name: --publish
-p
options.description: Publish a container's port(s) to the host

name: --quiet-pull
options.description: Pull without printing progress information

name: --rm
options.description: Automatically remove the container when it exits

name: --service-ports
options.description: Run command with the service's ports enabled and mapped to the host

name: --tty
-t
options.description: Allocate a pseudo-TTY

name: --use-aliases
options.description: Use the service's network useAliases in the network(s) the container connects to

name: --user
-u
options.description: Run as specified username or uid

name: --volume
-v
options.description: Bind mount a volume

name: --workdir
-w
options.description: Working directory inside the container

name: --timeout
-t
options.description: Specify a shutdown timeout in seconds

name: --abort-on-container-exit
options.description: Stops all containers if any container was stopped. Incompatible with -d

name: --always-recreate-deps
options.description: Recreate dependent containers. Incompatible with --no-recreate

name: --attach
options.description: Attach to service output

name: --attach-dependencies
options.description: Attach to dependent containers

name: --build
options.description: Build images before starting containers

name: --detach
-d
options.description: Detached mode: Run containers in the background

name: --exit-code-from
options.description: Return the exit code of the selected service container. Implies --abort-on-container-exit

name: --force-recreate
options.description: Recreate containers even if their configuration and image haven't changed

name: --no-build
options.description: Don't build an image, even if it's missing

name: --no-color
options.description: Produce monochrome output

name: --no-deps
options.description: Don't start linked services

name: --no-log-prefix
options.description: Don't print prefix in logs

name: --no-recreate
options.description: If containers already exist, don't recreate them. Incompatible with --force-recreate

name: --no-start
options.description: Don't start the services after creating them

name: --quiet-pull
options.description: Pull without printing progress information

name: --remove-orphans
options.description: Remove containers for services not defined in the Compose file

name: --renew-anon-volumes
-V
options.description: Recreate anonymous volumes instead of retrieving data from the previous containers

name: --scale
options.description: Scale SERVICE to NUM instances. Overrides the `scale` setting in the Compose file if present

name: --timeout
-t
options.description: Use this timeout in seconds for container shutdown when attached or when containers are already running

name: --wait
options.description: Wait for services to be running|healthy. Implies detached mode

subcommands.name: version
subcommands.description: Show the Docker Compose version information

name: --format
-f
options.description: Format the output. Values: [pretty | json]. (Default: pretty)

name: --short
options.description: Shows only Compose's version number

name: --ansi
options.description: Control when to print ANSI control characters ("never"|"always"|"auto")

name: --compatibility
options.description: Run compose in backward compatibility mode

name: --env-file
options.description: Specify an alternate environment file

name: --file
-f
options.description: Compose configuration files

name: --no-ansi
options.description: Do not print ANSI control characters (DEPRECATED)

name: --profile
options.description: Specify a profile to enable

name: --project-directory
options.description: Specify an alternate working directory (default: the path of the, first specified, Compose file)

name: --project-name
-p
options.description: Project name

name: --verbose
options.description: Show more output

name: --workdir
options.description: DEPRECATED! USE --project-directory INSTEAD. Specify an alternate working directory (default: the path of the, first specified, Compose file)
